PaymentTemplate.UIDescription: Federal payments include Federal Unemployment Insurance Tax.

PaymentFrequency.UIDescription: Annual Form 940 payment is due by the end of January of the following year

PaymentTemplate.UIDescription: Federal Unemployment Insurance Tax payments include Federal Unemployment Insurance Tax.

PaymentFrequency.UIDescription: Annual Form 940 payment is due by the end of January of the following year

PaymentTemplate.UIDescription: Federal Unemployment Insurance Tax payments include Federal Unemployment Insurance Tax.

PaymentFrequency.UIDescription: Quarterly Form 940 payments are due by the last day of the first month that follows the end of the quarter
Annual Form 940 payment is due by the end of January of the following year

Settlement.UIString: Enter a date between {0} and {1}. It cannot fall on a weekend day or holiday.

Law.Description: FUTA - In state w. no SUI

PaymentTemplate.UIDescription: Federal 941 include Federal Withholdings, Social Security, and Medicare.

PaymentFrequency.UIDescription: Semi-weekly Form 941 payments are due by the following Wednesday or Friday
Monthly Form 941 payments are due by the 15th day of the following month
Quarterly Form 941 payments are due by the last day of the first month that follows the end of the quarter
Annual Form 941 payment is due by the end of January of the following year

Settlement.UIString: Enter a date between {0} and {1}. It cannot fall on a weekend day or holiday.

PaymentTemplate.UIDescription: CA Personal Income Tax Withholdings and SDI payments include PIT Withholdings and State Disability Insurance.

PaymentFrequency.UIDescription: Monthly CA PIT/SDI payments are due by the 15th day of the following month
Quarterly CA PIT/SDI payments are delinquent if not paid by the last day of the first month that follows the end of the quarter
Semiweekly CA PIT/SDI payments are due by the following Wednesday or Friday
CA PIT/SDI payments are due by the next banking day following the payroll date.

Settlement.UIString: Enter a date between {0} and {1}. It cannot fall on a weekend day or holiday.

PaymentTemplate.UIDescription: CA UI and ETT payments include Unemployment Insurance and Employment Training Tax

PaymentFrequency.UIDescription: Quarterly CA UI/ETT payments are delinquent if not paid by the last day of the first month that follows the end of the quarter

Settlement.UIString: Enter a date between {0} and {1}. It cannot fall on a weekend day or holiday.

PaymentTemplate.UIDescription: IL PIT Withholding payments include Personal Income Tax Withholdings.

PaymentFrequency.UIDescription: Annual IL Withholding Income Tax payment is due by January 31 of the following year
Quarterly IL Withholding Income Tax payments are due by the last day of the month following the last month of the quarter
Monthly IL Withholding Income Tax payments are due by the 15th day and the last day of the month.
Quarter-monthly IL Withholding Income Tax payments are due by the 3rd business day following the end of the period.
Semi-monthly IL Withholding Income Tax payments are due by the 3rd banking day following the close of the semi-monthly period.

Settlement.UIString: Enter a date at least one day but no more than 60 calendar days in the future. It can't be a weekend day or holiday.

PaymentTemplate.UIDescription: IL UI payments include Unemployment Insurance.

PaymentFrequency.UIDescription: Quarterly Illinois UI payments are due by the last day of the month following the last month of the quarter.

Settlement.UIString: Enter a date at least one day but no more than 60 calendar days in the future. It can't be a weekend day or holiday.

PaymentTemplate.UIString: PA Employer Deposit Statement of Withholding
PaymentTemplate.UIDescription: PA Employer Deposit Statement of Withholding include Employer Deposit payment

PaymentFrequency.UIDescription: Jan - Nov PA-501 payment is due on or before 15th of the following month; Dec payment is due on or before Jan 31 of the following year.
Semi-Monthly PA-501 payments are due within 3 banking days after the close of the semi-monthly period.
Quarterly PA-501 payments are due by the last day of the month following the end of the quarter.

Settlement.UIString: Enter a date at least one day but no more than 60 calendar days in the future. It can't be a weekend day or holiday.

PaymentTemplate.UIString: ZZ Employer Deposit Statement of Withholding
PaymentTemplate.UIDescription: ZZ Employer Deposit Statement of Withholding Payment include Employer Deposit payment

PaymentFrequency.UIDescription: Jan - Nov payment is due on or before 15th of the following month; Dec payment is due on or before Jan 31 of the following year
Semi-Monthly payments are due within 3 banking days after the close of the semi-monthly period.
Quarterly ZZ-501 payments are due by the last day of the month following the end of the quarter
Annual ZZ-501 Withholding payment is due by the last day of February of the following year.

Settlement.UIString: blah

FormFrequency.UIDescription: Quarterly Form ZZ filing is due by the end of the next month following the end of quarter.

PaymentTemplate.UIString: YY Employer Deposit Statement of Withholding
PaymentTemplate.UIDescription: YY Employer Deposit Statement of Withholding include Employer Deposit payment

PaymentFrequency.UIDescription: YY-501 payments are due by the third business day following the payroll that caused the total accumulated tax withheld to equal or exceed $700.
Jan - Nov payment is due on or before 15th of the following month; Dec payment is due on or before Jan 31 of the following year
Semi-Monthly payments are due within 3 banking days after the close of the semi-monthly period.
Quarterly YY-501 payments are due by the last day of the month following the end of the quarter

Settlement.UIString: Enter a date at least 1 but no more than 30 days in advance.

PaymentTemplate.UIString: YY Employer Deposit Statement of Withholding
PaymentTemplate.UIDescription: YY Employer Deposit Statement of Withholding include Employer Deposit payment

PaymentFrequency.UIDescription: YY-501 payments are due by the third business day following the payroll that caused the total accumulated tax withheld to equal or exceed $700.
Jan - Nov payment is due on or before 15th of the following month; Dec payment is due on or before Jan 31 of the following year
Semi-Monthly payments are due within 3 banking days after the close of the semi-monthly period.
Quarterly YY-501 payments are due by the last day of the month following the end of the quarter

Settlement.UIString: Enter a date at least 1 but no more than 30 days in advance.

PaymentTemplate.UIString: YY Employer Deposit Statement of Withholding
PaymentTemplate.UIDescription: YY Employer Deposit Statement of Withholding include Employer Deposit payment

PaymentFrequency.UIDescription: YY-501 payments are due by the third business day following the payroll that caused the total accumulated tax withheld to equal or exceed $700.
Jan - Nov payment is due on or before 15th of the following month; Dec payment is due on or before Jan 31 of the following year
Semi-Monthly payments are due within 3 banking days after the close of the semi-monthly period.
Quarterly YY-501 payments are due by the last day of the month following the end of the quarter

Settlement.UIString: Enter a date at least 1 but no more than 180 days in advance.

FormFrequency.UIDescription: Annual Form YY filing is due by the end of the next month following the end of year.

PaymentTemplate.UIString: WW Employer Deposit Statement of Withholding
PaymentTemplate.UIDescription: WW Employer Deposit Statement of Withholding include Employer Deposit payment

PaymentFrequency.UIDescription: Eighth-monthly WW-501 Withholding payments are due by the 3rd working day following the close of the period
Jan - Nov payment is due on or before 15th of the following month; Dec payment is due on or before Jan 31 of the following year
Quarterly WW-501 payments are due by the last day of the month following the end of the quarter
Weekly WW-501 payments are due by the third business day following Friday or following December 31.

Settlement.UIString: Enter a date between {0} and {1}. It cannot fall on a weekend day or holiday.

FormFrequency.UIDescription: Quarterly Form WW filing is due by the end of the next month following the end of quarter.

FormGroup.UIDescription: WW Form Template Group contains the form templates for WW.
This is the description for an obsoleted Form Template Group.

PaymentTemplate.UIString: XX Employer Deposit Statement of Withholding
PaymentTemplate.UIDescription: XX Employer Deposit Statement of Withholding include Employer Deposit payment

PaymentFrequency.UIDescription: Monthly XX-501 payments are due by the last day of the second following month.
Split-monthly XX-501 Withholding payments are due by the 20th of the month in which the deposit period ends.
Quarterly XX-501 payments are due by the last day of the month following the end of the quarter

Settlement.UIString: blah

FormFrequency.UIDescription: Quarterly Form XX filing is due by the end of the next month following the end of quarter.

FormGroup.UIDescription: XX Form Template Group contains the form templates for XX.

PaymentTemplate.UIDescription: New Jersey Withholding Tax Payment include Withholding Tax payment

PaymentFrequency.UIDescription: Monthly NJ Withholding Income Tax payments are either due by the 15th of the next month or 30 days after the end of the month
Quarterly NJ WH payments are due by the 30th day following the end of the quarter
Weekly NJ WH payments are due by Wednesday of the following week

Settlement.UIString: Enter a date at least one day but no more than 60 calendar days in the future. It can't be a weekend day or holiday.

PaymentTemplate.UIDescription: New Jersey UI/DI/WF/HC Payment include UI/DI/WF/HC payment

PaymentFrequency.UIDescription: Quarterly NJ UI/DI//WF/HC payments are due by the 30th day following the end of the quarter

Settlement.UIString: Enter a date at least one day but no more than 60 calendar days in the future. It can't be a weekend day or holiday.

PaymentTemplate.UIDescription: CT WH Tax Payment include CT WH Tax payment

PaymentFrequency.UIDescription: Monthly CT WH payments are due on or before the 15th day of the following month
Quarterly CT WH payments are due by the last day of the month following the end of the quarter
Weekly CT WH payments are either due by the following Wednesday or the 2nd Wednesday following the payday

Settlement.UIString: Enter a date at least one day but no more than 60 calendar days in the future. It can't be a weekend day or holiday.

PaymentTemplate.UIDescription: CT Unemployment Insurance Tax Payment include Unemployment Insurance Tax payment

PaymentFrequency.UIDescription: Quarterly CT UI payments are due on or before the last day of the month following the close of the calendar quarter

Settlement.UIString: Enter a date at least one day but no more than 60 calendar days in the future. It can't be a weekend day or holiday.

PaymentTemplate.UIDescription: UT PIT Withholding payments include Personal Income Tax Withholdings.

PaymentFrequency.UIDescription: Monthly UT WH payments are due by the last day of the following month.
Quarterly UT WH payments are due by the last day of the month following the end of the quarter.
Annual UT WH payment is due by January 31st of the following year.

PaymentTemplate.UIDescription: FL UI payments include State Unemployment Insurance.

PaymentFrequency.UIDescription: Due the last day of the month following the end of the quarter. Example: Apr 30, Jul 31, Oct 31, and Jan 31. (E-pay due dates adjust to reflect Intuit's processing time.)

Settlement.UIString: Enter a date between {0} and {1}. It cannot fall on a weekend day or holiday.

FormFrequency.UIDescription: FL Form UCT-6 is due by the last day of the month following the end of the calendar quarter.
FL Form UCS-3 is due when there are any changes to the employer's location, contact info, or other.
FL New Hire Report is due within 20 calendar days after the employee is hired, rehired, or returns to work.

PaymentTemplate.UIDescription: GA Withholding payments include Income Tax Withholding.

PaymentFrequency.UIDescription: Due one banking day after payroll liability is incurred. (i.e., due Wednesday for liabilities incurred on Tuesday.)
Due Wednesday for paychecks issued Wednesday-Friday. Due Friday for paychecks issued Saturday-Tuesday.
Due the 15th of the following month. (For example, due Feb 15 for liabilities accrued in Jan.)
Due the last day of the month following the end of the quarter. (Apr 30, Jul 31, Oct 31, and Jan 31)
Due Jan 31 for liabilities accrued in the prior calendar year.

Settlement.UIString: Enter a date between {0} and {1}. It cannot fall on a weekend day or holiday.

PaymentTemplate.UIDescription: GA payment with monthly crossing and no split period Crossing

PaymentFrequency.UIDescription: Due Wednesday for paychecks issued Wednesday-Friday. Due Friday for paychecks issued Saturday-Tuesday.
Due the 15th of the following month. (For example, due Feb 15 for liabilities accrued in Jan.)

Settlement.UIString: Enter a date between {0} and {1}. It cannot fall on a weekend day or holiday.

PaymentTemplate.UIDescription: GA UI payments include Unemployment Insurance and Administrative Assessment Tax.

PaymentFrequency.UIDescription: Due the last day of the month following the end of the quarter. (Apr 30, Jul 31, Oct 31, and Jan 31)

EnrollmentGroup.UIDescription: Federal EFTPS Enrollment allows taxpayers to pay their federal taxes electronically

Login.LoginText: Enter your EIN and the PIN that you received from Internal Revenue Service during the enrollment process. Be sure to enter your EIN and PIN correctly, according to the guidelines enforced by the agency.
Login.EnrollText: If you're not already enrolled with EFTPS, you need to complete the enrollment process and set up your scheduled payments in QuickBooks before you can start making e-payments to this agency.

Footer.AuthorizeText: I authorize the agency to electronically debit the amount identified in the Summary section from my bank account for this payment. I verify that I'm legally authorized to make this payment to the agency on behalf of this company.

EnrollmentGroup.UIDescription: IL Business EF enrollment allows taxpayers to pay their Illinois taxes electronically

Login.LoginText: To submit your payment to the IL Department of Revenue (DOR), enter your name, phone number, and e-mail address.

Footer.AuthorizeText: Under penalty of perjury, I declare that I have reviewed the payment information and, to the best of my knowledge, it is correct. I consent that my payment of [amount] may be sent to Illinois by QuickBooks Payroll. I also consent to Illinois sending a receipt of transmission and an indication of whether or not my payment was accepted and, if rejected, for what reason. I authorize the Illinois Department of Revenue (or Illinois Department of Security if UI payment) and its designated financial agent to initiate an ACH electronic funds withdrawal.

EnrollmentGroup.UIDescription: This is a long description for the ZZ enrollment group.
This is a long description for the YY enrollment group.

Footer.AuthorizeText: I certify the enrollment information for YY.
I authorize the transaction for YY

EnrollmentGroup.UIDescription: This is a long description for the XX enrollment group.

Footer.AuthorizeText: I authorize the transaction for XX

EnrollmentGroup.UIDescription: This is a long description for the XXX enrollment group.

Footer.AuthorizeText: I authorize the transaction for XXX

EnrollmentGroup.UIDescription: This is a long description for the WW enrollment group.

Footer.AuthorizeText: I certify the enrollment information for WW.
I authorize the transaction for WW
